---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

## ✨ Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added to Dev DNA.

## 🎯 Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What limitation are you trying to overcome?

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented. Include as much detail as possible.

### 🎨 User Interface
How should this feature look and feel? Include mockups or screenshots if you have them.

### 🔧 Technical Details
Any technical considerations or implementation details you think are important.

## 🎭 Use Cases
Describe specific scenarios where this feature would be useful:

1. **Use Case 1**: [Description]
2. **Use Case 2**: [Description]
3. **Use Case 3**: [Description]

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
What other approaches or solutions have you considered? Why do you prefer your proposed solution?

## 📊 Impact Assessment
How would this feature improve Dev DNA?

- **User Experience**: [e.g., Makes it easier to understand results]
- **Functionality**: [e.g., Adds new analytical capabilities]
- **Performance**: [e.g., Improves loading times]
- **Accessibility**: [e.g., Makes app more usable for everyone]

## 🎯 Priority
How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical - Blocker for my use case
- [ ] High - Very important for my workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## 🔗 Related Issues
Are there any existing issues or discussions related to this feature?

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## 🤝 Willing to Contribute
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to help implement this feature
- [ ] Maybe, I need guidance on where to start
- [ ] No, I'm not able to contribute code at this time

## 📎 Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar requests
- [ ] I have described the problem clearly
- [ ] I have proposed a detailed solution
- [ ] I have considered alternative approaches
- [ ] I have included use cases and impact assessment

---

## 🙏 Thank You!
Thanks for taking the time to suggest this feature! We appreciate your ideas for making Dev DNA better. 🚀
